failedAssertions.reason: Link pill typography mismatch persists: observed 16px white text instead of required 17px neutral2.
CTA typography mismatch persists: observed 16px/400 instead of required 17px/medium.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: no real transaction data rows rendered after retries/reloads (empty-state only), so body4/13px data-cell typography could not be measured.
Blocked: in-session WebSocket message receipt could not be observed; probe connected to ws://localhost:3101 but received zero messages during observation window.
Blocked: chart remained in "Unable to load chart data" state and showed no live updates during timed observation; repeated API 429 rate limiting observed.
Blocked: connected-wallet state could not be reached in headless environment due to missing wallet extension/credentials, so balances could not be validated.
